UI_QuickRestart_NoData_Tooltip: No character data - start a new save with this mod enabled or use "Continue with new character" once to enable Quick Restart
UI_QuickRestart_SandboxConflict_Subtitle: The sandbox settings have changed since this world was created. Which settings should your Fresh World use?
UI_QuickRestart_SandboxConflict_Saved_To: Use sandbox settings from when the world was created. Recommended if you didn't change anything manually. A mod may have modified your current settings as part of its features.
UI_QuickRestart_SandboxConflict_Current_: Use sandbox settings as they are now. Choose this if you intentionally made changes and want them carried over.
